name: learning-brain
description: Evidence-grounded learning design for Codex. Bundles the Learning Brain MCP server with workflow discipline that keeps design, audit, and evidence tasks rigorous.

interface.longDescription: Bundle the Learning Brain MCP server with workflow discipline that elicits context, audits outputs, and keeps instructional design work evidence-grounded.
defaultPrompt: Audit this workshop outline with Learning Brain.
Rewrite these learning objectives with Learning Brain.
